div.p: Ref: TDD-DIAG-008 | Level: Implementation Grade Standardizes ML Model Inference Input Validation

ol.li: Dynamic Dimensions: None in the shape tuple (e.g., (None, 3, 224, 224)) allows for variable batch sizes.
DType Strictness: Conversion uses torch.as_tensor. If data cannot be safely cast, RuntimeError is wrapped.
Alignment: C-level structs for this schema must be __attribute__((packed)) or aligned to 8-byte boundaries to avoid bus errors on ARM.
